scenario: presentationFor(type) — renderer + action keyed on the open `type` (spec §2/§3.4, src/core/type-presentation.ts) — for each recognized claude file. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 (renderer/action = data table keyed on the open `type`, generic fallback for unknown types), §3.4 (presentationFor: unknown type ⇒ generic renderer + `akm show <ref>`). Presentation table = src/core/type-presentation.ts TYPE_PRESENTATION; KNOWN_TYPES = src/core/recognition-util.ts.
realWorldSource: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/claude-directory — command/agent/skill semantics the renderer actions describe
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no claude adapter exists yet. Presentation is keyed on the open `type`, NOT on the adapter (spec §2), so a claude `command` renders identically to an akm `command`: the value here is presentationFor(type) = {label, renderer, action(ref)} from src/core/type-presentation.ts, with the concrete `ref` substituted into the action.

RESOLVED (open question 1, maintainer resolution 2026-07): `instruction` (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md) is now a first-class KNOWN_TYPE (src/core/recognition-util.ts) with its OWN TYPE_PRESENTATION entry — label 'Instruction', renderer 'knowledge-md' (REUSED: instruction files are markdown read exactly like knowledge), action `akm show <ref> -> read the project instructions` (mirrors knowledge's read action). presentationFor('instruction') therefore returns this type-specific presentation, NOT the generic {label:'Asset'} fallback. The CLAUDE.md entry below is pinned to that presentation.

action strings are the src/core/type-presentation.ts forms (`akm show <ref> -> …`); the longer buildShowResponse action strings in renderer/all-types.json are the OLD src/output/renderers.ts surface — the format-neutral presentation table is the forward-looking one the new adapters key on.

commands/deploy.md.label: Command
commands/deploy.md.action: akm show sample-claude//commands/deploy -> fill placeholders and dispatch

agents/reviewer.md.label: Agent
agents/reviewer.md.action: akm show sample-claude//agents/reviewer -> dispatch with full prompt

skills/pdf-processing/SKILL.md.label: Skill
skills/pdf-processing/SKILL.md.action: akm show sample-claude//skills/pdf-processing -> follow the instructions

CLAUDE.md.label: Instruction
CLAUDE.md.action: akm show sample-claude//CLAUDE -> read the project instructions
CLAUDE.md.resolved: RESOLVED (open question 1) — `instruction` is a first-class KNOWN_TYPE with its own TYPE_PRESENTATION entry: label 'Instruction', renderer 'knowledge-md' (reused — instruction files are markdown read exactly like knowledge), action mirrors knowledge's read action. NOT the generic fallback.
